productDisplayName: Nike Women Black Solarsoft Thong Flip Flops
description: Style Noteflip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The nike Celso Girl Solarsoft Thong, will add a splash of color to your feet and life, transporting you to a world of absolute comfort and delight. They have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any kind of casual outfits. Product DetailsBroad synthetic straps for improved comfort, has a synthetic fabric toe separator for a soft feelGrooved, lightweight rubber footbed with colourful print on the heel regionTough rubber outsole with deep flex groovesWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
